summary: A local television news segment carrying a LIVE marker. It shows a female reporter standing at night in front of a fenced facility, then cuts to a uniformed sheriff speaking at a press event in front of a sheriff's office wall, and to exterior footage of a Martin County Sheriff's Office building with a marked patrol SUV parked outside. A lower-third chyron reads MAN CAUGHT HAVING SEXUAL CONTACT WITH MINOR, with a MARTIN COUNTY location tag.

script.scene: A female reporter stands at night in front of a fenced facility.
A uniformed sheriff speaks at a press event, then exterior footage of the Martin County Sheriff's Office.

notable_text: MAN CAUGHT HAVING SEXUAL CONTACT WITH MINOR; MARTIN COUNTY; MARTIN COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE
